title: GitOps Configuration
description: Configuration for pulling symbol, config and lookup files from a remote GitHub repo to enable centralized configuration management

tenx.description: The target 10x pipeline to run (e.g., run, compile)

source.description: The source type for this include

enabled.description: Controls whether to enable this pull config

token.description: Access token for accessing the GitHub repo. See https://docs.github.com/en/authentication/keeping-your-account-and-data-secure/managing-your-personal-access-tokens

repo.description: The GitHub user/repo from which to pull (e.g., 'owner/repo')

branch.description: Branch on repo. If null, uses the repo's default branch

paths.description: Glob patterns within 'repo' to pull and extract to a temp folder

syncInterval.description: Interval to check the remote branch for updates (e.g., '5min'). Set to null to disable sync
